'''Silvu Donte''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Advozse/Legends|Advozse]] who was a member of the [[Zorzsin family]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], he represented his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] [[Riflor/Legends|Riflor]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] until he and his people joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="University" />
